testCases.title: Product Variations - Mobile Variant Selection
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Variant selectors optimized for touch (min 44x44px) — actual 32x32px
testCases.notes: Color swatches measured 32x32px on mobile (375x667). Fails WCAG 2.1 AA Touch Target Size minimum 44x44px. No horizontal scroll. Variant selectors functionally working but tap-targets too small for accessibility.

testCases.title: Product Variations - Default Variant Selection
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] Default variant pre-selected on page load (not blank state); [STATE] Add to Cart enabled immediately without user interaction
testCases.notes: Multi-attribute hoodie loads with all four pickers (Color/Size/Size_chart/Fabric) blank. Price: N/A. Add to Cart disabled with aria-label 'Select options to proceed'. May be by-design for 4-attribute products to avoid presenting unintended SKU; flag for product spec review.

testCases.title: Product Variations - Variant URL Parameters
testCases.failedAssertion: [NAV] URL updates with human-readable variant parameters; [STATE] Opening variant URL pre-selects that variant
testCases.notes: After selecting variant attributes (Color, Size, Size_chart, Fabric), URL did not update with query params (e.g., ?size=L&color=Black). URL stayed at master product slug. Direct variant URL pre-selection cannot be tested. Sharing variant via copied URL would not preserve selection.

testCases.title: Product Configuration - Image Upload
testCases.notes: No configurable products with image-upload section type discovered in this storefront environment. Tested products with file-upload-suggesting names (custom-jersey, phone-case, off-road-bike, gift-box) all use radio/text/optional sections only. No input[type=file] found on any tested PDP. Skipping pending dedicated test fixture.

testCases.title: Product Configuration - Bundle/Kit Builder
testCases.notes: Multi-step bundle builder feature (basket size -> 3-10 items -> message) not present in this storefront's configurable product model. Configurable products use single-page section model with required/optional radios and text inputs. Gift-Box product offers GIFT MESSAGE optional text but no multi-step wizard. Skipping pending feature/fixture confirmation.

testCases.title: Product Configuration - Save Configuration for Later
testCases.notes: No 'Save Configuration' button or named-config save feature found on configurable PDPs. Cart-line 'Save for later' exists but operates at cart-line level (post-add), not as named PDP configuration. Skipping pending feature confirmation.

bugs.title: Variation color swatches too small on mobile (32x32px, below WCAG 44x44px)
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Sign in as B2B user (TechFlow org)
2. Resize browser to 375x667 (mobile viewport)
3. Navigate to /products-with-options/variations-of-jeans/jeans/vintage-california-beach-pullover-hoodie
4. Scroll to OPTIONS section
5. Inspect Color swatches dimensions
bugs.expected: Variant swatches at least 44x44px per WCAG 2.1 AA Success Criterion 2.5.5
bugs.actual: Color swatches render at 32x32px on mobile viewport

bugs.title: Multi-attribute variation product loads with no default variant selected
bugs.failedAssertion: [STATE] Default variant pre-selected on page load
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Fresh sign-in (clear session)
2. Navigate to /products-with-options/variations-of-jeans/jeans/vintage-california-beach-pullover-hoodie (PDP with 4 variant attributes: Color, Size, Size_chart, Fabric)
bugs.expected: Default variant pre-selected (or first available variant). Add to Cart enabled. Price displayed.
bugs.actual: All four variant pickers blank on load. Price: N/A. Add to Cart disabled with aria-label 'Select options to proceed'.
bugs.notes: Possibly by-design for multi-axis (4-attribute) products to avoid pre-selecting an unintended SKU. Flag for product/UX spec review. Could be acceptable behavior if test expectation is updated.

bugs.title: Variant attribute selections do not propagate to URL query params
bugs.failedAssertion: [NAV] URL updates with human-readable variant parameters
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to /products-with-options/variations-of-jeans/jeans/vintage-california-beach-pullover-hoodie
2. Select Size (e.g., Size_chart=L) — this resolves all four attributes via auto-completion
3. Inspect window.location.href
bugs.expected: URL updates with variant query params (e.g., ?color=Blue&size=L) so a copied/shared variant URL pre-selects on load
bugs.actual: URL stays at master product slug; no variant query params appended. Direct variant URL pre-selection feature is unavailable.

_progressNote: Suite complete: 31/31 cases executed. 25 PASS, 3 FAIL, 0 BLOCKED, 3 SKIPPED.
